title: Welcome to Your Dashboard
content: This is your control center. Let's walk through the key areas so you can get started.

title: Navigation
content: Switch between the overview and settings from here. The overview shows your database stats at a glance.

title: Settings
content: Customize your app's branding, appearance, and notification preferences from the settings panel.

title: Account Menu
content: Access your profile, share the app, replay this tour, or sign out from this menu.
